KXCPI-26MAY-T0.4.reason: Tariff-driven inflation pulse fading by May 2026 and base effects moderating, but sticky services keep >0.4% still likely at ~74%.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.5.reason: Above-trend monthly print; easing energy prices and shelter deceleration make >0.5% possible but below-even odds at ~32%.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.6.reason: Would require significant energy spike or shelter re-acceleration; tail risk slightly above market given residual tariff pass-through uncertainty.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.7.reason: Rare shock scenario in post-tariff normalization environment; marginally above market's 2c given fat-tail uncertainty.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.8.reason: Extreme outcome requiring simultaneous energy surge, shelter shock, and services spike; consistent with market pricing at near-zero.
